event_description: A stationary aircraft on grass is tracked through EO and IR while camera orbit changes screen-side pavement cues and EO-only paint cues fail to transfer directly to IR.

notes.annotation_visibility_warning: Do not export main_event, event_description, answer, option_roles, or rationales to model prompts.
notes.design_revision_note: Video-reasoning v13: replace broad identity conclusions with specific temporal order, screen-side, occlusion, and EO/IR contrast-transfer judgments.
acceptance_gates: Run prompt leakage audit after request export.
Do not export answer, option_roles, rationale, main_event, event_description, or time_reference metadata to prompts.
Use nearby true-looking alternatives: adjacent vehicles, nearby road edges, neighboring pavement, and modality contrast reversals.
Keep wording natural and answerable by a human viewer from the full video.

qa.question: In the first close EO pass, which ground relation places the aircraft?

options.A: grass strip between a narrow paved strip on the left and a broader paved area on the right
options.B: grass strip between a broader paved area on the left and a narrow paved strip on the right
options.C: pavement strip between grass on both sides, with the aircraft centered on pavement
options.D: tree-side driveway between two grass patches, with the aircraft under the trees

qa.question: In the close IR pass, where is the bright pavement relative to the aircraft body?

options.B: under the aircraft body through the center
options.C: near the lower-left edge with the body on pavement
options.D: hidden by trees before the aircraft body appears

qa.question: In the later EO pass after the orbit, which screen-side layout is visible?

options.A: broad dark pavement on the left; narrow road or driveway on the right
options.B: broad dark pavement on the right; narrow road or driveway on the left
options.C: broad dark pavement under the aircraft; grass only at the top
options.D: tree canopy over the aircraft; no road or pavement beside it

qa.question: Which EO sequence describes the pavement shifting around a grass-side aircraft?

options.A: right early, upper-right next, left later
options.B: broad pavement left early, lower-left next, right in the later pass
options.C: broad pavement under the aircraft early, then under it again later
options.D: no broad pavement early, then the aircraft enters pavement later

qa.question: Which IR sequence tracks the aircraft through the scale change?

options.A: large grass body, then smaller grass body between paved areas
options.B: large body on pavement with grass at the edge, then smaller body centered on pavement
options.C: two warm road dots first, then a smaller body under the trees
options.D: bright road streak first, then compact vehicle-like blob on grass

qa.question: Which EO detail becomes a weak direct cue in IR?
Which chain keeps the aircraft off pavement in both modalities?

options.A: EO grass between paved edges -> later EO pavement at screen side -> IR body on grass
options.B: EO aircraft on broad pavement -> later EO pavement at screen side -> IR body on grass
options.C: EO grass between paved edges -> later EO aircraft enters driveway -> IR body on pavement
options.D: EO tree shadow over aircraft -> later EO driveway -> IR road streak replaces aircraft

qa.question: Which cue argues against a taxi-along-pavement interpretation?

options.A: grass-side body; pavement shifts screen side
options.B: grass-side body crossing onto the lane centerline
options.C: body disappearing under trees before the later IR view
options.D: body turning into two compact road objects

qa.question: Which early-to-late EO chain would be unsafe to treat as aircraft travel?

options.A: screen angle changes; grass and pavement bracket aircraft
options.B: aircraft leaves the grass and follows the paved lane
options.C: tree cover replaces the aircraft before pavement appears
options.D: aircraft becomes two small road vehicles after pullback

qa.question: In the later IR view, which paved-surface layout surrounds the aircraft?

options.A: broad pavement lower-left; road above/right; aircraft on grass
options.B: brighter broad pavement upper-right, narrower road lower-left, aircraft on pavement
options.C: two bright roads crossing under the aircraft body
options.D: tree canopy surrounding the aircraft with no pavement nearby

qa.question: Which cross-modal chain avoids the paint-color shortcut?

options.A: EO outline on grass -> EO pavement side changes -> IR outline on grass
options.B: EO red stripe -> EO pavement side changes -> IR brightest road stripe
options.C: EO outline on grass -> EO aircraft enters road -> IR outline on pavement
options.D: EO tree shadow -> EO pavement side changes -> IR road streak

qa.question: Which full-clip reading uses the orbit and IR evidence together?

options.A: parked grass-side aircraft; orbit shifts pavement; paint cue lost in IR
options.B: taxiing aircraft from grass to pavement; IR shows the move as a road streak
options.C: parked road vehicle first; later EO resolves it as a driveway object
options.D: tree shadows as target first; IR turns them into an aircraft body
